assertions.reason: Observed /list -> /attach -> 3 forwarded agent messages in order -> /detach; the server cleared attachment and a direct relay prompt was ignored after detach, showing the wrapper left forwarding mode.
The bot attach command set attachedUser=cross-user-1775006767280-0ecc96 on the server, and the wrapper log recorded the attach-status update after 11ms.
Each attached agent delta was present in relay history and delivered once to the mock Feishu chat as [cross-main-1775006767280-0ecc96] cycle-* messages.
After /detach, no Feishu message was sent for the post-detach delta, but relay history did not retain that delta.
The attached plain-text Feishu message arrived at the mock codex stdin as a turn/start JSON object with the exact newline, unicode, backtick, and JSON-special characters intact.
After prompt injection, the mock codex echo response flowed back through the wrapper, relay, and bot to the Feishu chat.

The attached /stop command produced a user-facing stop confirmation, injected turn/interrupt into the mock codex stdin, and returned the relay session to idle after an interrupted turn/completed record.
Local wrapper stdin turn/start triggered an end-to-end auto-detach: the bot notified the chat, server attachment cleared, and subsequent agent output stopped forwarding.

commands.command: npm --prefix "/data/dl/fschannel/shared" run build && npm --prefix "/data/dl/fschannel/server" run build && npm --prefix "/data/dl/fschannel/bot" run build && cargo build --manifest-path "/data/dl/fschannel/wrapper/Cargo.toml"
commands.observation: Shared, server, and bot builds plus wrapper cargo build all completed successfully; full output is saved in build-prereqs.txt.

commands.command: cd "/data/dl/fschannel/bot" && npx vitest run src/integration-core-flows.test.ts -t "registers wrappers, relays prompts and interrupts through the server API, and auto-detaches on local input|forwards every attached agent message under burst output even when history snapshots are bounded"
commands.observation: Targeted integration-core-flows validation passed with 2 tests passing and 3 skipped by filter; output is saved in vitest-integration-core-flows.txt.
Manual end-to-end cross-main check saved explicit attach/prompt/interrupt/auto-detach evidence for session wrapper-385720-1775006767291; 7 assertions passed and 1 failed in the manual run.

summary: Validated 8 relay-bot-integration cross-area assertions: 7 passed and 1 failed. The only failure was VAL-CROSS-004, where post-detach agent output stayed out of Feishu but did not remain in relay history.
